desc: Rotates each moving element about the closest-approach point of its extended axis and the reference's extended axis, so the two axes end up intersecting with the reference direction.
summary: Rotates each moving element about the closest-approach point of its extended axis and the reference's extended axis, so the two axes end up intersecting with the reference direction.
usecase: Converging pipe / duct runs whose axes must meet at a specific apex.
precondition: Active document. 1 reference + ≥1 mover resolved. Both have directional geometry.
postcondition: Each mover rotated so its axis meets the reference axis at a common apex.
logictree: 1) Resolve reference + movers. 2) Extract reference direction + start. 3) Transaction: per mover compute closest-approach point of axes, compute ΔZ-rotation, RotateElement about axis Z through that apex. 4) Commit, log. 5) Failure → WireFault + rollback.
